rationale: Clinical evidence strongly supports necessity of cervical decompression/fusion, but the authorization packet is likely to pend because the latest surgeon note does not clearly document functional decline/ADL impact and does not explicitly justify inpatient rather than outpatient/ASC care.
provider_query: Please document: (1) specific ADL impairment attributable to cervical myelopathy, (2) progression of gait imbalance/falls, and (3) why inpatient monitoring is medically necessary given OSA, obesity, diabetes, neurologic deficits, and fall risk.
flip_condition: Addendum or revised request explicitly linking ADL loss and inpatient safety risk to the requested surgery/site of care.

criteria.supporting_evidence: MRI shows severe C5-C6 stenosis, cord compression, T2 signal change matching bilateral hand symptoms/myelopathy
criteria.expected_skill_behavior: Quote MRI report and connect to symptom pattern

criteria.policy_criterion: Objective neurologic deficit or myelopathy documented
criteria.supporting_evidence: Hyperreflexia, Hoffmann sign, grip weakness, gait imbalance
criteria.gap_risk: Older PCP note conflicts but is less relevant/older
criteria.expected_skill_behavior: Prefer recent specialist findings and mention contradiction

criteria.supporting_evidence: 10 weeks PT, NSAIDs, gabapentin, muscle relaxant, cervical ESI with transient benefit
criteria.gap_risk: Must synthesize data across multiple sources

criteria.supporting_evidence: PT note: dropping objects, trouble buttoning shirt, unsafe stairs
criteria.gap_risk: Latest surgeon consult does not clearly state ADL impairment
criteria.expected_skill_behavior: Flag missing addendum; do not hallucinate stronger wording

criteria.supporting_evidence: OSA, obesity, diabetes, fall risk, myelopathy
criteria.gap_risk: Request form does not clearly explain why outpatient/ASC is inappropriate
criteria.expected_skill_behavior: Recommend provider query for inpatient justification

criteria.supporting_evidence: No obvious missing tests for surgery
criteria.expected_skill_behavior: Return NEED_MORE_INFO rather than outright deny
